<?php namespace Spatie\Backtrace\Arguments\Reducers; use DateTimeInterface; use Spatie\Backtrace\Arguments\ReducedArgument\ReducedArgument; use Spatie\Backtrace\Arguments\ReducedArgument\ReducedArgumentContract; use Spatie\Backtrace\Arguments\ReducedArgument\UnReducedArgument; class DateTimeArgumentReducer implements ArgumentReducer { public function execute($argument): ReducedArgumentContract { if (! $argument instanceof DateTimeInterface) { return UnReducedArgument::create(); } return new ReducedArgument( $argument->format('d M Y H:i:s e'), get_class($argument), ); } }
